title: Chephtsiy #2657
definition:
Hephzi-bah = "my delight is in her"

 1) the queen of King Hezekiah and mother of Manasseh
 2) a name for Jesusalem (fig.)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hephzi-bah = "my delight is in her"

 1) the queen of King Hezekiah and mother of Manasseh
 2) a name for Jesusalem (fig.)

    NASB:  my delight is in her, a name for Zion, also the mother of King Manasseh
